title: Junior Business Development Manager at Brookfield India REIT

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Brookfield India REIT
jsonLd.description:
Brookfield India REIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!
